steps.title: Combine the findings
steps.content: Marks and Costa found no enduring increase in investment after liberalization. Harris found significant increases in the three years after liberalization.

steps.title: Resolve the tension
steps.content: Choice A adds consistency that the passage does not show. Choice B invents a three-year requirement and policy duration issue, and Choice C discusses economists' expectations without evidence. The combined findings support short-term gains that do not last. The answer is D.
